totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication
totp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
totp.label: Authentication Code

register.title: Worker Registration
register.description: Register to become a worker. After registration, your application will be reviewed by an administrator.
register.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.successMessage: Your worker registration application has been submitted.
register.accessCodeWarning: Save this access code! You will need it to access worker features after your application is approved by an administrator.
register.step1: Save the access code in a safe place
register.step2: Wait for the administrator to review your application
register.step3: You can log in after approval
